content.en:
"Ao Chen, I won't stop you from entering the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, but you must not enter the depths of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, which is extremely dangerous, even if you have eight awakening combat powers, there is a high possibility of falling. Besides, your eight-time awakening combat power relies on the reincarnation supreme supernatural power, and the reincarnation supreme supernatural power consumes too much, so you can't fight for a long time!"

Poison Ancestor said.

"Lord Poison Ancestor, I know!"

Ye Tian agreed on the surface, but he definitely wouldn't do it.

Once he entered the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, the Poison Ancestor couldn't stop him.

Subsequently.

He directly entered the reincarnation purple abyss and disappeared.

......

Reincarnation of the Purple Abyss.

Ye Tian came in, and his surroundings were filled with purple light.

This purple light shines on the body, and it feels a little hot.

"This purple light is very lethal, but it is not a threat to the powerful Origin Upper Realm Overlord. "

Ye Tian slowly advanced, and then found a cave in the reincarnation purple abyss.

The reincarnation purple abyss is an abyssal terrain, with many caves on the periphery, and it is a downward terrain, and the further down you go, the closer you get to the depths of the reincarnation abyss.

Ye Tian arranged a formation in this cave to block the aura, and then began to copy the second Ao Chen's body.

Soon, the second Aochen copy body was copied out.

Swish!

Ye Tian, the Ao Chen, copied his body and left, continuing to explore the reincarnation purple abyss.

He didn't waste time on the periphery, although there were a lot of resources on the periphery, but these resources didn't help him much, he needed that kind of very top-notch resources, and they could only be bred in the depths of the reincarnation purple abyss.

Soon.

Ye Tian encountered the creatures in the reincarnation purple abyss.

Rumble!!!!

Purple creatures emerged, all of them showing an incomparably powerful aura, the number was about thirteen, and the weakest was estimated to be comparable to the four awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and the most powerful of them was already comparable to the Seven Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

For the average Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, facing these purple creatures must be a difficult battle.

But Ye Tian ignored them.

【Purple Sun Ruins Beast】

Ye Tian spied on their information and continued to move forward.

Just as these Purple Yang Ruins Beasts attacked him, he waved his hand casually.

Bang bang bang!!!

The bodies of these Purple Sun Ruins beasts exploded one after another, turning into countless fragments, and they were killed by Ye Tian casually.

However, as Ye Tian went deeper, he encountered more and more Purple Yang Ruins Beasts.

"This reincarnation purple abyss is too terrifying, so many creatures comparable to the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, placed on the other side of eternity, it is impossible for such a place to exist. "

The key thing is that these reincarnation Purple Abyss creatures can still go out, so that the Reincarnation Celestial Clan can suppress them.

And.

Even if the reincarnation of the Purple Abyss creatures is killed, it is estimated that it will be easy to breed, otherwise there would not be so many creatures.

Since Ye Tian came all the way through, his speed was very fast, and it didn't take long for him to approach the depths of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss.

Whoa!!!!

The surroundings became dim, and purple pupils appeared, staring at Ye Tian one after another.

"Finally some big guys are here!!!"

In an instant, one purple dragon after another slaughtered Ye Tian.

It can be seen from the replication talent that this group of creatures is the Zilin Giant Dragon Clan, and all of them have reached the limit of seven awakenings, and their strength can be called a very top existence among the seven awakenings, and the number has reached more than ten.

It can be said that if it is replaced by the other seven awakenings of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, it is estimated that he will soon be besieged and killed.

"Die!"

Ye Tian held the Reincarnation Supreme Treasure Spear, and with one blow, countless marksmanship swept through time and space, piercing these Zilin Giant Dragons one after another, killing them.

And at the moment when these Zilin dragons were bombarded, a terrifying aura erupted.

"Outsiders, you are looking for !!! death"

A purple dragon that came out of the depths of time and space crossed over, and every time it moved, it made time and space vibrate, and every scale contained infinite mysteries.

This is not an ordinary Zilin Giant Dragon, but a Purple Lin Giant Dragon that has reached the level of the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and it is not an ordinary Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord combat power.

Ye Tian was naturally not afraid of this purple lin dragon, and directly used the reincarnation flow technique to kill the other party.

Thundered!!!

One man and one dragon fight.

At the beginning, Ye Tian did not cast the Spear of the Reincarnation Supreme Divine Power Ruin Heaven, but he also had the combat power of the top eight awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, completely crushing this Zilin Giant Dragon.

I saw that the scales on this purple dragon continued to crumble, and a large amount of blood burst out and spilled into the void.

Gradually.

The purple dragon's injuries were getting worse and worse.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian unleashed the Spear of the Ruin Heaven, which directly pierced its head and completely killed it.

Subsequently, he put away the corpses of these Zilin dragons, these creatures are full of treasures, which can be used to refine secret medicines to cultivate members of the Tianshan Pavilion, and even refine them, which can be used to change the foundation of the human race, refine weapons, and so on.

In short, this kind of Origin Upper Realm Overlord-level creature was simply a priceless treasure for those weak creatures.

Ye Tian can't look down on it, but he will also keep it for Tianshan Pavilion and the human race.

"Ahead is the deep territory of the Reincarnation Purple Source, continue to copy a copy body near here, if it falls, it is also convenient to replenish. "

Subsequently, he also found a cave nearby, and soon made a copy of the body as a preparation.

That's it.

Ye Tian directly broke into the depths of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss.

Airplanes!!!!!

An even more terrifying purple light shone brightly, and even Ye Tian felt a little uncomfortable.

Moreover, this suppression is very powerful, and it is difficult to perceive how far to probe.

In the dark, danger can come at any time.

Abrupt.

A creature whose strength was comparable to the top eight awakening Origin Upper Realm overlord level appeared, and it was eyeing Ye Tian.

【Ruin Snake】

This creature is in a semi-revealing state, its physical body does not seem to be strong, but its will is extremely terrifying, its eyes are staring at Ye Tian, as if it wants to shatter Ye Tian's will.

"Similar to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who takes the third path, he is mainly based on will!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rumble!!!!!

An illusory world appeared in an instant, wanting to suppress Ye Tian.

At the same time, a terrifying force seemed to penetrate Ye Tian's body and bombard his Origin Realm will.

This is how the Ruin Snake attacks!

Then.

Ye Tian no longer hid his strength, his whole body aura exploded, and he used the two reincarnation supreme divine powers of the Reincarnation Flow Body Technique and the Ruin Sky Spear.

Burst!

The Ruin Sky Spear pierced through the body of the Phantom Ruin Snake, and his Origin Realm Will was also injured by the opponent's Will attack.
